_comment: Edit this file to adjust the severity scale, then re-run 'node scripts/import-laws.mjs' to update all POIs.

scale.-10: Confirmed recent hate violence at a specific location (attack within last 2 years), or active credible threat
scale.-9: Criminal law with documented active enforcement, OR area with multiple documented anti-trans incidents
scale.-8: Criminal law (felony or misdemeanor) with credible enforcement history
scale.-7: Criminal law on books, rarely or never enforced
scale.-6: Civil penalties with real teeth (significant fines, loss of licenses or benefits)
scale.-5: Civil penalties — discriminatory policy with some legal consequence
scale.-4: Discriminatory policy without meaningful legal penalty
scale.-3: Multiple minor anti-trans laws or policies in effect
scale.-2: Public officials actively making anti-trans statements or publicly advocating for legislation, even if nothing has been proposed
scale.-1: Anti-trans legislation passed in the last 5 years (minor in scope — does not rise to criminal or significant civil penalty)
scale.0: Neutral — no notable laws or climate indicators in either direction
scale.+1: No anti-trans laws on the books in this jurisdiction
scale.+2: Non-discrimination protections or pro-trans laws in place
scale.+3: Non-discrimination protections actively enforced with documented outcomes
scale.+4: Protections across multiple domains (employment, housing, public accommodations)
scale.+5: Strong multi-domain protections with enforcement track record
scale.+6: Strong protections plus community infrastructure (legal aid, trans-specific services)
scale.+7: Comprehensive protections, welcoming community, low documented incident rate
scale.+8: Sanctuary status or shield laws (protect residents from enforcement of other states' anti-trans laws)
scale.+9: Multiple affirming laws, active enforcement, and strong community support
scale.+10: Model jurisdiction — sanctuary laws, shield laws, comprehensive protections, active welcoming community

law_severity._comment: Maps (category, penalty_type) to a severity value. penalty_type is set in anti-trans-laws.json.

enforcement_modifier._comment: Added to the base law_severity value when enforcement level is specified. Capped at ±10.

expiry_days._comment: Default visible_end offset from enacted_date for each category.
